title: Vizhiyal Pesum Lyrics Enna Satham Indha Neram
stanzas:
hey vizhiyal pesum velicha poo nee
viralaal pesum anichcha poo nee
mozhiyum oliyum mounam kollum
kadavul pesum oli nee

karunai pesum eerap poo nee
katrum pesum vaasap poo nee
seviyum idhazhum dhiyaanam
kaanum kadavul
pesum mozhi nee

paravasam thondrum nodiyile
vizhiye mozhiyaai maari
vannamum koottiduthe

chinna chinnathaai
minnum aasai
siragu mulaithu varudhe

paarvai ondrile mozhiyai
meettum mozhiyin thaaragai nee
 seiga ondrile artham koottum
mazhalai naattiyam nee nee nee

vaanavillai vilaikku vaangi nee
varnam theetti kondaadu

boomiyile vinnai kotti nee
thulli kuthiththuthan
vilaiyaadu.

...
mozhigal ketka valiyillai
mozhigal pesa idhazhgalile
mounam kooda pilai illai

kadavulin tharisanamaai
vandha mazhalaiyin
punnagai keerthanamaagum

hey vizhiyal pesum velicha poo nee
viralaal pesum anichcha poo nee
mozhiyum oliyum mounam kollum
kadavul pesum oli nee

karunai pesum eerap poo nee
katrum pesum vaasap poo nee
seviyum idhazhum dhiyaanam
kaanum kadavul
pesum mozhi nee

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Vizhiyal Pesum conveys deep emotions of love and connection, reflecting the beauty of relationships through its poetic lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Enna Satham Indha Neram, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic bond between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and composed by Naga, known for their exceptional contributions to Tamil music.

When was the song released?

Vizhiyal Pesum was released on June 20, 2014, and has since become a favorite among fans of romantic Tamil songs.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vizhiyal Pesum, the lyrics beautifully articulate the feelings of love and admiration, making it a standout romantic track in Enna Satham Indha Neram. The song's soothing melody, combined with Chinmayi's enchanting vocals, evokes a sense of tranquility and warmth. It captures the essence of intimate moments shared between lovers, making it perfect for weddings and anniversaries. Overall, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vizhiyal Pesum from Enna Satham Indha Neram is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung beautifully by Chinmayi, this song showcases a unique blend of heartfelt lyrics and soothing music composed by Naga. Dive into the enchanting world of this romantic track that resonates with every listener's soul.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, the flower that speaks with your eyes, you are the flower that speaks with your fragrance, you are the sound and silence that God speaks through.
You are the flower that speaks of compassion, you are the flower that speaks of knowledge, you are the words that show the divine in the heart.
In the moment when the excitement rises, the eyes become a voice and the colors come together.
Little by little, the desires are growing like wings that are sprouting.
In one glance, you meet the words, you are the star of speech, you create a dance of meaning in one place.
You are not just a light in the sky, you have created a colorful dance.
On earth, you have thrown the sky and playfully jumped around.
... there is no way to hear words, there is no silence in the words that speak in the limbs.
The smile of a child that came as a vision of God will become a song of praise.
Hey, the flower that speaks with your eyes, you are the flower that speaks with your fragrance, you are the sound and silence that God speaks through.
You are the flower that speaks of compassion, you are the flower that speaks of knowledge, you are the words that show the divine in the heart.
